expectations.evidence: AppService has buildProfileSummary method in app.service.ts
ProfileSummary interface includes userName, pendingTodos, completedTodos, unreadNotifications
normalizeCount method returns 0 for null, undefined, or negative values
getProfileSummary() returns this.appService.getProfileSummary() directly without wrapping
Spec files are .spec.ts files co-located in src/ outputs
Methods use camelCase: buildProfileSummary, getProfileSummary, normalizeCount, getHello
